---
title: "Untitled"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(shiny)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
setwd("~/dev/studia/sem_4/viz/interactive")
data = read.csv("IMDB top 1000.csv")
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart A

```{r}

```

Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart B

```{r}

```

### Chart C

```{r}

```
